scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/react
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/core && npm test -w packages/react
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run typecheck -w packages/react
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/core && npm run lint -w packages/react
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w packages/core && npm run lint:fix -w packages/react
scripts.format: npm run format -w packages/core && npm run format -w packages/react
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:fix -w packages/core && npm run format:fix -w packages/react
scripts.ci: npm run ci -w packages/core && npm run ci -w packages/react
